creator: pavlo@cs.wisc.edu
text:
This is my fourth attempt to submit this port update! The 'send-pr' command-line tool does not seem to work, or my patch is getting rejected??

This patch will upgrade Condor from 6.8.4 to the new stable series 6.8.5
It also contains fixes for installing in the pointyhat test system

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: diff patch included
